versions.summary: M7 · Push notifications — Firebase messaging, in-app banner, deep-link tap routing.

sections.label: Push notifications
items: Settings → Push notifications screen with 3 states (cloud disabled / off / on)
Foreground in-app banner with auto-dismiss + tap-to-deep-link routing
Background message handler + notification-tap deep-link routing for cold launches
4 new Maestro e2e flows; 32/32 flows green
Requires google-services.json (Android) and GoogleService-Info.plist (iOS) — see operator-todo.md

sections.label: Brand parity
items: Native launcher icon geometry mirrors the bookkeeprr design system (long/longest/short bars with rounded corners)

versions.summary: First public release · onboarding, library, activity, settings, audit.

sections.label: Initial release
items: Onboarding wizard with system-browser auth handoff (forms / OIDC / forward-proxy)
Library grid + list, series overview, volumes tab
Add-series search across AniList / ComicVine / OpenLibrary / Audnex
Filter & sort sheet, interactive release picker with grab mutation
Activity queue + history (5s poll), audit log with verb badges
Settings home with seven accent themes and light/dark scheme switcher
